description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New listing (Published: July 21, 2026)

The Hanno District Traffic Safety Association is now accepting applications for the Reiwa 8 (2026) Safe Driver Awards.

【Award Categories】
Six types based on accident-free and violation-free driving records: 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, and 35 years. Periods under 5 years are rounded down. Example: a 19-year 11-month record qualifies for the 15-year award.

【Eligibility Requirements】
• Must be a member of the Hanno District Traffic Safety Association (membership card required)
• Have not previously received an award in the same category
• Have not been sentenced to imprisonment or heavier penalty in the past 10 years, or to a fine or lighter penalty in the past 5 years
• Must be able to attend the awards ceremony on Saturday, October 31 at the Hidaka City Comprehensive Welfare Center Koryo no Sato (日高市総合福祉センター高麗の郷)

【Application Period and Location】
Dates and hours: August 17 – September 17, 2026, 9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. (closed Saturdays, Sundays, and holidays)
Location: Hanno District Traffic Safety Association Office (inside Hanno Police Station)
Documents to bring: accident-free/violation-free certificate, Safe Driver Award application form, driver's license, membership card

【How to Obtain the Accident-Free/Violation-Free Certificate】
Apply through a post office using the application form available at any prefectural police station or police box (processing fee: 800 yen), or apply in person at the Center for Automotive Safety and Driver Training office (inside the Saitama Prefectural Police Driving License Center, Konosu City) with a photo ID and seal. Processing takes approximately 2 weeks.

Inquiries: 042-973-7047

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jinkenkurashianzen/11743.html
summary: ℹ️ Application period now open for Reiwa 8 (2026) Safe Driver Awards
